Thanks for contributing! A few quick notes:

- For non-trivial changes, an issue or discussion linked below helps reviewers understand the context.
- Keep PRs focused — one concern per PR makes review easier and reverts safer.
- See CONTRIBUTING.md for code style and the overall PR process.
-->

## How was it tested?

<!-- Describe what you ran. Include the test command(s) and any manual steps. -->

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm --filter @filemcp/api test`
- [ ] `pnpm --filter @filemcp/web test`
- [ ] Manually verified in the browser (if UI)

## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- For UI changes, before/after screenshots or a short Loom/GIF help a lot. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title is short and descriptive
- [ ] Code follows the conventions in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or APIs changed
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry added if user-facing
- [ ] No `console.log` / debug code left behind
